# Extracao: transcription_mp4_45__Trait_44_-_Great_Salespeople_are_willing_to_make_the_uncomfortable_or_difficult_calls_

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_45__Trait_44_-_Great_Salespeople_are_willing_to_make_the_uncomfortable_or_difficult_calls_.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Great salespeople are willing to make the uncomfortable and difficult calls. They don't just scoop cream off the top. I know guys that are great or pure great compared to industry standards because they know how to just like filter right off the top. They just take all the good stuff but they never reach their full potential and that's what we're talking about here. We're not talking about great compared to others. We're talking about great compared to your potential. The greats know how to dig down past the cream and go find the ugly stuff at the bottom and pull it up to the top. They know how to go get stuff nobody sees. These people know how to make the tough calls, make the late calls, make the rough calls, call the people that are insane, call the people that are wack, call the people that are crazy, call the people that are cheap. They know how to go in, insert themselves into those scenes willing to, okay, call on people other people won't call. They literally do the impossible and they're willing to. They're willing to get their hands dirty. They don't just look for the easy stuff and that builds a discipline within them. They turn deals, no deals into deals. They turn deals into deals that everyone else is giving up on. They do the impossible. The greats dig in. That's what you need to do. Big work ethic. Be willing to go find those ugly deals that everybody else has given up on that you now see as opportunities because those deals, those deals will be bigger and have more memory for you than the trophies you collect.
